name: Bar-b-q Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds medium shrimp, cleaned and shelled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the liquids and Head Country Seasoning in a large bowl.
2. Add the shrimp and marinate in the refrigerator for 2 to 3 hours.
3. Place the shrimp on a grill basket or thread them onto skewers for easy turning.
4. Grill over medium hot flame for 3 to 5 minutes per side.
5. Serve with Head Country Bar-B-Q Sauce.
6. Makes 24 to 30 appetizer servings or serves 6 to 8 as an entree.
